'''鈭歞h-l-y-f''' ('''kadhalyefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:altre|altre]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:altre|altre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-l-y-f
|-
! Lemma
| kadhalyefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhalyefoko|thidhalyefoko]] || [[word:jidhalyefoko|jidhalyefoko]] || [[word:shidhalyefoko|shidhalyefoko]] || [[word:kidhalyefoko|kidhalyefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhalyefoko|thuthudhalyefoko]] || [[word:jujudhalyefoko|jujudhalyefoko]] || [[word:shushudhalyefoko|shushudhalyefoko]] || [[word:kukudhalyefoko|kukudhalyefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhalyefoko|thedhalyefoko]] || [[word:jedhalyefoko|jedhalyefoko]] || [[word:shedhalyefoko|shedhalyefoko]] || [[word:kedhalyefoko|kedhalyefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhalyefoko|thodhalyefoko]] || [[word:jodhalyefoko|jodhalyefoko]] || [[word:shodhalyefoko|shodhalyefoko]] || [[word:kodhalyefoko|kodhalyefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhalyefoko|thodhalyefoko]] || [[word:jodhalyefoko|jodhalyefoko]] || [[word:shodhalyefoko|shodhalyefoko]] || [[word:kodhalyefoko|kodhalyefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhalyefoko|th忙dhalyefoko]] || [[word:j忙dhalyefoko|j忙dhalyefoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhalyefoko|sh忙dhalyefoko]] || [[word:k忙dhalyefoko|k忙dhalyefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhalyefoko|thadhalyefoko]] || [[word:jadhalyefoko|jadhalyefoko]] || [[word:shadhalyefoko|shadhalyefoko]] || [[word:kadhalyefoko|kadhalyefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
